scripts.build: cd packages/tui && pnpm run build && cd ../ai && pnpm run build && cd ../agent && pnpm run build && cd ../coding-agent && pnpm run build && cd ../mom && pnpm run build && cd ../web-ui && pnpm run build && cd ../pods && pnpm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,mom,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,white,green,magenta" "cd packages/ai && pnpm run dev" "cd packages/agent && pnpm run dev" "cd packages/coding-agent && pnpm run dev" "cd packages/mom && pnpm run dev" "cd packages/web-ui && pnpm run dev" "cd packages/tui && pnpm run dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd packages/ai && pnpm run dev:tsc" "cd packages/web-ui && pnpm run dev:tsc"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && pnpm run check:browser-smoke && cd packages/web-ui && pnpm run check
scripts.version:patch: pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install
scripts.version:minor: pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install
scripts.version:major: pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build && pnpm run check
scripts.publish: pnpm run prepublishOnly && pnpm publish -r --access public
scripts.publish:dry: pnpm run prepublishOnly && pnpm publish -r --access public --dry-run
